meaning: n.盖子,封面,藉口vt.覆盖,铺,掩饰,保护,掩护,包括,包含,适用vi.覆盖,涂,代替
examples: If it turns cold, cover the plants.
Cover me while I move forward.
The participants will need to cover the expenses of the creation of their original works.
We breathlessly await publication with a single question: Will Fabio be on the cover?
